title: Brain2Qwerty v2 – Meta's non-invasive brain-computer interface
abstract: Tired of slow typing? Brain2Qwerty v2 is here, straight from your mind to the keyboard—without lifting a finger! Keep it a secret; maybe you'll be writing code in no time. Ready to see how brain waves can control your typing?
abstract_zh: 你还在为打字慢而烦恼吗？Brain2Qwerty v2来了，就像是直接把你的想法从大脑里“偷”出来，按到键盘上！这回可别告诉别人是你写的代码哦～快来试试吧，脑电波也能玩转键盘！
